components.name: color-math
components.title: Color math
components.description: RGB type, luminance, and truecolor -> xterm256/ansi16 downsampling. The value substrate under the theme.

components.name: design-tokens
components.title: Design tokens
components.description: The raw sRGB palette (the amber-on-near-black identity). The single source of truth for color values.

components.name: text-layout
components.title: Text layout
components.description: UTF-8 width, column-bounded truncation, and word-wrap with hanging indent. Curses-free and allocation-free.

components.name: theme
components.title: Theme
components.description: Semantic roles + the public cs_theme API: named themes, per-role overrides, mode resolution, and the shared color resolver.

components.name: glyphs
components.title: Glyphs
components.description: Capability-aware box/marker glyphs (UTF-8 with ASCII fallbacks). Header-only.

components.name: surface
components.title: Render surface
components.description: The neutral cs_surface every component draws to, with a stream (SGR) backend and a curses backend behind an ops vtable. Requires the Curspan cli-style and/or tui runtime for the backends it enables.

components.name: rule
components.title: Rule
components.description: A horizontal divider, optionally with a centered label.

components.name: heading
components.title: Heading
components.description: A styled section heading, optionally underlined with a rule.

components.name: badge
components.title: Badge
components.description: A small inline status label, colored by variant.

components.name: note
components.title: Note / callout
components.description: A callout block (info/success/warning/error) with a colored gutter and wrapped body.

components.name: keyvalue
components.title: Key/value list
components.description: An aligned list of key -> value rows.

components.name: list
components.title: List
components.description: A bulleted or numbered list with word-wrap and hanging indent.

components.name: table
components.title: Table
components.description: A columnar table with alignment and width budgeting.

components.name: spinner
components.title: Spinner
components.description: A frame-based activity indicator (braille or ASCII line).
